core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix High-Finance aesthetics with Cinematic spacing.
Emotion First: Every interaction must feel heavy, premium, and deliberate.
Negative Space: Luxury is the abundance of space. Use p-12 where p-4 is expected.
Dark Mode Default: The application is native dark mode. No toggle needed.

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3. Tracking-tight. Weight: 600 or 700.

body.usage: Use for p, span, div, inputs. Tracking-normal. Weight: 300 (light) or 400 (regular).

mono.usage: Use for tiny labels, dates, or technical metrics.

accent.description: Primary is Platinum/Silver. Secondary is Muted Bronze (use sparingly for active states).

grid_strategy.marketing: Use the 'Tetris' grid: grid-cols-12 with col-span-8 (Hero) and col-span-4 (Sidebar).
grid_strategy.dashboard: Use the 'Dense' grid: grid-cols-4 with gap-4.

layout.border_radius: rounded-none (sharp) or rounded-sm (2px) only. NO large rounded corners. This is serious business.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-none h-12 px-8 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs
buttons.ghost: text-white/60 hover:text-white hover:bg-transparent uppercase tracking-widest text-[10px]

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 rounded-none px-0 py-4 focus:border-white focus:ring-0 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 h-auto

calendar.instructions: Customize Shadcn calendar. Dark theme. Selected date should be White text on Bronze bg. Today is underlined.

dialog.instructions: Use for Video Player and Appointment Details. Backdrop blur-xl. Border border-white/10.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle, dark gradients only. 'bg-gradient-to-b from-transparent to-black' for bottom fades.
visual_enhancers.noise: Add a fixed noise overlay at 3% opacity over the entire app for filmic texture.

calendar.features: Date selection, Time slot grid (morning/afternoon), Timezone detection mock

video_testimonials.interaction: Clicking a card opens a Dialog with the video player.

case_studies.layout: List view with 'Download' icon on right.

admin.layout: Sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Uploads, Settings). Table view for content.
admin.upload_ui: Drag and drop zone (use react-dropzone if available, else standard input type='file' styled as a zone).

general: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. No purple/teal gradients.
Transitions: Use 'transition-colors duration-300' or 'transition-transform duration-500 ease-out'. NO 'transition-all'.
Alignment: Left align text mostly. Center align only for dramatic Hero statements.
Icons: Use Lucide React (default). Stroke width 1.5px (thin and elegant).
Testing: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
